intro.title: Your Sleep Audit
intro.description: Understand what's affecting your sleep and where small changes can help.

s1.title: How has your sleep been?
s1.desc: Select any that feel true for you lately

recommendations.solid: Your habits are solid! Small tweaks can make it even better.
recommendations.some: Some disruptions detected. Habit changes can help quickly.
recommendations.many: Several factors are impacting your sleep. We can work through them together.

options.text: I go to bed at very different times each night
My sleep environment isn't dark, quiet, or comfortable
I scroll on my phone right before sleeping
I have caffeine or alcohol close to bedtime
I wake during the night and struggle to go back to sleep
My mind races with thoughts when I try to sleep
I rarely feel refreshed after a night's sleep

complete.title: Audit Complete
complete.message: Your sleep score is {{score}}/7. Understanding these patterns is the first step toward deeper, more restorative rest.
